allow: Bash(node -e "try { const p = require\(''ffmpeg-for-homebridge''\); console.log\(''ffmpeg-for-homebridge:'', p\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(''not found:'', e.message\); }")

Bash(node -e "try { const p = require\(''ffmpeg-for-homebridge''\); console.log\(''path:'', p\); const fs = require\(''fs''\); console.log\(''exists:'', fs.existsSync\(p\)\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(''error:'', e.message\); }")
Bash(node -e "const p = require\(''ffmpeg-static''\); console.log\(''ffmpeg-static path:'', p\);")
